title: AIWebFeeds — Minimal Contributor Feeds Schema
description: Ultra-simplified schema: contributors only provide a URL and topics. Everything else (title, feed URL, metadata) is auto-enriched via platform detection, feed discovery, and RSSHub fallback.

schema_version.description: Semantic version for this file format.

http_uri.description: Any HTTP(S) URL - can be a direct feed URL, website, or platform-specific URL (Twitter profile, YouTube channel, Reddit subreddit, etc.)

url.description: Any URL: direct RSS/Atom feed, website homepage, or platform URL (x.com/username, youtube.com/channel/ID, reddit.com/r/subreddit, github.com/owner/repo, etc.). System auto-detects platform and enriches.

topics.description: 1-6 topic IDs from topics.yaml that categorize this source.

title.description: Optional custom title. If not provided, title will be auto-extracted from the feed during enrichment.

notes.description: Optional contributor notes about this source (quality, update frequency, special considerations, etc.)

source.description: Minimal source entry - only URL and topics required. Title and metadata auto-enriched, but can be overridden with custom values.
